Advanced Placement (AP)

Students who complete exams or courses with duplicate or overlapping content will be awarded credit for only one exam or course.

Mathematics

NameMin AP Score for CreditUW CourseCredit AwardMeets UW Requirement
Calculus BC5MATH 124, MATH 1255, 5NSc, RSN
3,4MATH 1245NSc, RSN
Calculus AB2Placement into MATH 112 or MATH 1240
Precalculus3,4,5MATH 1205NSc, RSN

Calculus AB score 2 grants placement only and no course credit.

Arabic

NameMin AP Score for CreditUW CourseCredit AwardMeets UW Requirement
Arabic Language5ARAB 201, ARAB 202, ARAB 2035, 5, 5A&H, FL

NOTE: No credit for native speakers of Arabic.

Malformed subject

NameMin AP Score for CreditUW CourseCredit AwardMeets UW Requirement
Broken Exam5CSE 121, CSE 1224NSc
